div1.entryFree:
Deliverance, 1) release: Meas. III, 1, 105. IV, 2, 13. Merch. III, 2, 38. H4B II, 1, 138. H8 II, 2, 46.
2) the state of being disburdened of a child: ne'er mother rejoiced d. more, Cymb. V, 5, 370.
3) utterance: if seriously I may convey my thoughts in this my light d. All's II, 1, 85. you have it from his own d. II, 5, 4. and at each word's d. stab poniards in our flesh, H6C II, 1, 97.
